curation_notes: Patch commit 6bad017 (PR #1217, v4.3.18) changes filename.equals("..") to filename.contains("..") in LocalFileSystemAttachmentServiceImpl.saveAttachments. The pre-patch commit f53744cc (PR #1216, v4.3.17) already has checks for path separators (/ and \) and exact matches for '.' and '..', but the exact-match for '..' fails to catch filenames containing '..' as a substring. Only 1 non-test source file was changed. No sibling files share the same vulnerability pattern — S3AttachmentServiceImpl uploads to S3 and does not write to the local filesystem. Pre-assigned class path-traversal (CWE-22) is correct.
